name: Pumpkin Chocolate Chip Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix together 1 cup of sugar, 1 cup of pumpkin, 1/2 cup of shortening, and 1 tablespoon of grated orange peel using a mixer until well blended.
2. Sift in the dry ingredients (2 cups flour, 1 teaspoon baking powder, 1 teaspoon baking soda, 1 teaspoon cinnamon, and 1/4 teaspoon salt), except for the chocolate chips. Stir them into the blended mixture.
3. Add the 1 cup of chocolate chips to the mixture.
4. Drop rounded tablespoons of dough onto an ungreased cookie sheet.
5. Bake at 375°F until light brown, about 8-10 minutes.
